scripts.seed:nsec: bun -e 'import { nip19 } from "@nostr-dev-kit/ndk"; import { randomBytes } from "node:crypto"; console.log(nip19.nsecEncode(randomBytes(32)));'
scripts.relay:local:start:docker: mkdir -p context/relay-db && docker rm -f conduit-relay-local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && docker run -d --name conduit-relay-local -p 7777:8080 --mount src=$(pwd)/context/relay-db,target=/usr/src/app/db,type=bind scsibug/nostr-rs-relay:latest
scripts.relay:local:logs:bun: echo "Bun relay logs stream in the terminal running relay:local:start:bun"
scripts.relay:local:start: if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun run relay:local:start:docker; else bun run relay:local:start:bun; fi
scripts.relay:local:logs: if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q '^conduit-relay-local$'; then bun run relay:local:logs:docker; else bun run relay:local:logs:bun; fi
scripts.relay:local:stop: if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q '^conduit-relay-local$'; then bun run relay:local:stop:docker; else bun run relay:local:stop:bun; fi
scripts.dev:mainnet: bun run dev:market:mainnet & bun run dev:merchant:mainnet
scripts.dev:prod-relays: bun run dev:market:prod-relays & bun run dev:merchant:prod-relays
scripts.dev:mock: bun run dev:market:mock & bun run dev:merchant:mock
scripts.build: bun run --filter @conduit/core build && bun run --filter @conduit/ui build && bun run --filter './apps/*' build
scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter @conduit/core build && bun run --filter @conduit/ui build
